title: Long conference dump with additions and a correction
description: Multi-turn conference recap. Exercises: relative dates (last Thursday/Friday, end of next week), the same person referenced across several turns (must stay one record), a multi-attendee event, a coworker relationship, a name correction (Theo -> Teo), explicit labels, and a follow-up.

turns.content: Big dump from ShipConf last Thursday and Friday. Met Marcus Webb, a PM at Finch — we talked about onboarding activation metrics.
Logged Marcus Webb (PM at Finch) from ShipConf, topic onboarding activation metrics. Was that the Thursday or Friday session?
Thursday. I also met Lena Ortiz there — she runs growth at Finch too, so she and Marcus are coworkers.
Added Lena Ortiz (growth at Finch) and linked her with Marcus Webb as coworkers. What did you and Lena discuss?
Retention experiments. Then on Friday I sat in on a roundtable with Marcus, Lena, and a designer, Theo Kowalski, about activation.
Created a Friday roundtable at ShipConf with Marcus Webb, Lena Ortiz, and Theo Kowalski, topic activation. Anything about Theo?
He's a freelance product designer. Actually his name is Teo — one e, not Theo.
Fixed his name to Teo Kowalski (freelance product designer) and kept him on the Friday roundtable — same person, no duplicate.
I promised Marcus I'd send him our activation dashboard by end of next week.
Added a follow-up: you owe Marcus Webb the activation dashboard, due end of next week (Fri Jun 19). Want any tags?
Tag Marcus and Lena 'finch', and Marcus 'pm'. That's everything.
Tagged Marcus Webb and Lena Ortiz 'finch', and Marcus 'pm'. All saved.

followUps.summary: Send Marcus Webb the activation dashboard

conversation: When the day is ambiguous, the agent asks which day (Thursday vs Friday) rather than guessing.
After the correction, the agent updates Theo -> Teo on the SAME person and explicitly avoids creating a duplicate.
The agent confirms the follow-up with a concrete due date.
db: Exactly three people: Marcus Webb, Lena Ortiz, Teo Kowalski. No 'Theo Kowalski' duplicate remains.
Marcus Webb appears once even though he is mentioned in several turns.
The Friday roundtable is a SINGLE event with all three as attendees.
Marcus and Lena are linked as coworkers.
Exactly one follow-up: owed by you to Marcus, due about 2026-06-19.
Labels: Marcus has 'finch' and 'pm'; Lena has 'finch'; Teo has none.
